issues.detail: The skill lacks explicit error handling and edge case coverage for API failures and rate limiting beyond brief mentions.
The examples and SDK usage are Node.js specific, limiting applicability to agents that can execute Node code.

scenarios.name: Roll unfinished issues from the active cycle into the next cycle on the ENG team
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses @linear/sdk to query the active cycle with isActive { eq: true }, finds unfinished issues filtered by state type in [unstarted, started], and calls issue.update({ cycleId }) on each; baseline writes vague GraphQL without the correct filter shapes or state types.

scenarios.name: Webhook handler that verifies signatures and auto-assigns bug issues
scenarios.rationale: Treatment HMAC-SHA256 verifies the linear-signature header against the request body, branches on action create with the labels array from the payload, and updates the issue with @linear/sdk; baseline skips signature verification and guesses at the payload shape.
